Title: [EPIC] Foundation and app skeleton
Body:
Goal: Establish the desktop app foundation and repository standards.

Scope:
- Choose desktop shell (Electron or Tauri) and lock architecture decision.
- Create React + TypeScript app scaffold.
- Establish CI with lint/typecheck/test jobs.
- Add contributor docs and templates.

Done when:
- App boots locally.
- CI is green on default branch.
- README and CONTRIBUTING cover setup and contribution workflow.

Title: Set up desktop app scaffold (React + TypeScript + desktop shell)
Body:
Create the first runnable app scaffold.

Tasks:
- Add workspace structure for UI and desktop runtime.
- Define shared config for linting, formatting, and tsconfig.
- Add scripts for dev/build/test.

Acceptance criteria:
- `npm run dev` starts desktop app shell.
- Typecheck and lint pass.

Title: Implement secure Cloudflare token storage
Body:
Add credential storage using OS keychain and avoid plaintext secrets.

Tasks:
- Persist API token via keychain integration.
- Mask token in UI logs.
- Add token validation call and error UX.

Acceptance criteria:
- Token is not stored in repo or plain config files.
- Invalid token shows actionable error.

Title: Build D1 database list view
Body:
Create initial screen to list accessible D1 databases.

Tasks:
- Fetch D1 database list via Cloudflare API wrapper.
- Add search/filter.
- Add empty/error states.

Acceptance criteria:
- User can see and select any accessible D1 database.

Title: Add repository standards and OSS docs
Body:
Set up OSS-facing docs and templates.

Tasks:
- Add CODE_OF_CONDUCT, CONTRIBUTING, issue templates, PR template.
- Add architecture doc and roadmap section.

Acceptance criteria:
- New contributors can clone, run, and open PRs from docs alone.

Title: [EPIC] D1 explorer and SQL tooling
Body:
Goal: Let users inspect schema/data and run SQL safely.

Scope:
- Table/schema explorer.
- Paginated row viewer.
- SQL editor with result grid and history.
- Guardrails for destructive actions.

Done when:
- User can query and update data from the app with clear feedback.

Title: Implement schema explorer (tables, columns, indexes)
Body:
Build a schema tree for selected database.

Tasks:
- Fetch metadata and render table details.
- Show column types, PK/FK, and indexes.

Acceptance criteria:
- Explorer updates when selected DB changes.
- Errors handled without crashing.

Title: Build paginated table data viewer
Body:
Render table rows with pagination and column-aware formatting.

Tasks:
- Add row fetch endpoint wrapper with limit/offset.
- Add pagination controls and row count display.

Acceptance criteria:
- Large tables remain responsive.
- Pagination state survives navigation within a DB.

Title: Create SQL editor with execution runner
Body:
Provide SQL input area and execution controls.

Tasks:
- Execute queries/statements.
- Show execution time, affected rows, and errors.
- Add keyboard shortcut for run.

Acceptance criteria:
- Valid SQL returns result data.
- Invalid SQL returns readable error details.

Title: Add query history and saved snippets
Body:
Track query history per database and allow snippet reuse.

Tasks:
- Persist query history locally.
- Add clear history and favorite snippet actions.

Acceptance criteria:
- History is scoped by DB and ordered newest-first.

Title: Add destructive-query safety guardrails
Body:
Prevent accidental data loss.

Tasks:
- Detect destructive statements (DROP, DELETE without WHERE, etc.).
- Add confirm modal and optional read-only mode.

Acceptance criteria:
- Destructive action requires explicit confirmation.

Title: [EPIC] SQLite import engine
Body:
Goal: Import local SQLite databases into D1 reliably.

Scope:
- File selection and validation.
- Schema translation and compatibility checks.
- Batched data migration with retry/reporting.

Done when:
- Typical SQLite datasets import with clear progress and recovery guidance.

Title: Build SQLite file ingestion flow
Body:
Add file picker and preflight checks.

Tasks:
- Support `.sqlite` and `.db`.
- Validate readable file and detect schema entities.

Acceptance criteria:
- Invalid file types are rejected with guidance.

Title: Implement schema migration translation (SQLite -> D1)
Body:
Translate schema safely and report incompatibilities.

Tasks:
- Parse tables/indexes/constraints.
- Identify unsupported syntax and propose rewrites.

Acceptance criteria:
- Dry run report lists required changes before execution.

Title: Implement batched data import with retries
Body:
Move rows in batches with backoff and resumability.

Tasks:
- Chunk inserts.
- Add retry logic and error aggregation.
- Add rollback/continue options when possible.

Acceptance criteria:
- Import progress UI updates continuously.
- Partial failures are clearly reported.

Title: Design import progress and validation UX
Body:
Provide visibility and confidence during migration.

Tasks:
- Show staged progress: preflight, schema, data, validation.
- Show summary with counts and mismatches.

Acceptance criteria:
- User sees pass/fail status and next steps.

Title: [EPIC] Metrics and settings
Body:
Goal: Expose D1 operational data and configuration controls.

Scope:
- Usage and storage metrics.
- Limits and quota views.
- Settings panel and refresh controls.

Done when:
- User can inspect key health and config signals without leaving app.

Title: Add storage and usage metrics dashboard
Body:
Render usage, storage, and request metrics from D1 APIs.

Tasks:
- Define polling/refresh strategy.
- Add simple charts/cards.

Acceptance criteria:
- Metrics update reliably and handle API errors gracefully.

Title: Build database settings panel
Body:
Display and edit supported DB-level settings.

Tasks:
- Fetch settings details.
- Add edit and save flow with validation.

Acceptance criteria:
- Supported settings can be modified from app with confirmation.

Title: [EPIC] Hardening, testing, and OSS launch
Body:
Goal: Ship a stable first public release.

Scope:
- Unit/integration/e2e coverage.
- Packaging for desktop targets.
- Release docs/changelog process.

Done when:
- Public v0.1.0 is documented, test-backed, and installable.

Title: Add unit and integration test harness
Body:
Create baseline test coverage for API client and import logic.

Tasks:
- Add fixtures for schema and data edge cases.
- Ensure CI executes test matrix.

Acceptance criteria:
- Critical paths have automated coverage and regressions fail CI.

Title: Add end-to-end flows for auth/query/import
Body:
Automate top user workflows.

Tasks:
- Cover auth, SQL execution, and SQLite import success/failure.
- Run in CI with deterministic fixtures.

Acceptance criteria:
- E2E suite validates MVP user journeys.

Title: Desktop packaging and release automation
Body:
Prepare binaries and release pipeline.

Tasks:
- Configure packaging for macOS/Windows/Linux.
- Generate changelog and release notes.

Acceptance criteria:
- Tagged release produces distributable artifacts.

Title: Launch docs and community triage workflow
Body:
Prepare open-source launch operations.

Tasks:
- Publish roadmap, support policy, and issue triage rubric.
- Add labels for `good first issue` and `help wanted`.

Acceptance criteria:
- New contributors can find starter tasks and report issues cleanly.
